creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Tue May 13 14:34:58 2014
New Revision: 353955
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/353955
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r353955/

Log:
  - Update to 5.8.1
  - While I'm here, fix PORTDOCS
  
  Changes:	http://mmonit.com/monit/changes/
  PR:		ports/189724
  Submitted by:	Martin Pala <martinp@tildeslash.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/sysutils/monit/Makefile
  head/sysutils/monit/distinfo

Modified: head/sysutils/monit/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/monit/Makefile	Tue May 13 14:34:52 2014	(r353954)
+++ head/sysutils/monit/Makefile	Tue May 13 14:34:58 2014	(r353955)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	monit
-PORTVERSION=	5.8
+PORTVERSION=	5.8.1
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.mmonit.com/monit/dist/
 
@@ -27,7 +27,7 @@ PLIST_FILES=	bin/monit \
 
 SUB_FILES=	pkg-message
 
-PORTDOCS=	CHANGES COPYING README
+PORTDOCS=	COPYING README
 
 SSL_CONFIGURE_OFF=	--without-ssl
 

Modified: head/sysutils/monit/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/monit/distinfo	Tue May 13 14:34:52 2014	(r353954)
+++ head/sysutils/monit/distinfo	Tue May 13 14:34:58 2014	(r353955)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (monit-5.8.tar.gz) = 0c00573ebc0156c534a5952f392c2a7bedde194f8261c05497322055938847f5
-SIZE (monit-5.8.tar.gz) = 1237958
+SHA256 (monit-5.8.1.tar.gz) = a25e4b79257ac29ebaf46605dccb7ed693c8e001669c0ccc8feb22e7d4c870e5
+SIZE (monit-5.8.1.tar.gz) = 1212491
